data.name: Elven Adoption Agency
data.detailed_description:
Thank you for considering the Elven Adoption Agency, a dating service created by elves and enjoyed by everyone! We join Jessie at the beginning of his adventure after having been selected by the EAA to find companionship in a world of sexual liberation, genuine intimacy, and futanari elves! From making good initial impressions, to finding the right connection to make a date with, you will help guide Jessie in this new environment and navigating these novel relationships!

Our femboy hero of the hour, Jessie is ready to explore but still not sure what he's exactly looking for. He comes into this with an open heart and open mind, looking to see who might make those sparks fly and light up his life! Good thing Jessie likes to switch it up by nature, so he's very much open to seeing what sort of fun he might have in any given circumstance!

Studious and submissive in her demeanor, Saelwen may come off as timid but don't let that fool you! She has an impressive appetite for learning (and teaching others if its the right subject), as well as a willingness to assist others with whatever may be required. It is Saelwen's hope to connect with someone who she can be truly open and vulnerable with, someone who sees and appreciates the sort of strength she brings with her.

Beautiful and intimidating in equal measure, Ryllae is quite aware of the sort of hold she has on others. Dominant by nature, Ryllae delights seeing all ways she can play around with those who fall under her enchantment. And while toying with those who fall under her enchantment is fun, Ryllae relishes most the opportunity to not just sate her appetite for good fun, but to quench the longing of her soul.

Confident about who she is and what she is about, Melriel is often described as easy going and someone full of lust (for life)! She's always ready for some sexy exploration and isn't particular if it has her end up on top or bottom, it's more about about experiencing that sweet release for her! But Melriel also knows that an adventure is only as good as company you're with, so it's her hope to find kindred spirit to journey with along the way.

Inspired by her own journey, Agath founded the Elven Adoption Agency to help others find meaningful connections. Her stoic, almost conceited attitude can often mean that she comes off as a bit of an ice queen but in the end, Agath is here to help provide guidance to Jessie as he goes through the adoption process.

Features
- Fully rendered futanari elf content, illustrated by Kasparition

- Written by kinksters and inspired by BDSM lifestyles

- Between ~13,000 and ~20,000 words of engaging dialogue and intimate encounters

- Custom music created by Surrayyah Chestnut

- Full voice acting performed by kinksters

- NSFW sound effects

- Detailed and expressive sprites

- 100+ pieces of art

data.short_description: A short erotic visual novel where you discover a sexually liberated elven world with your choice of futanari companion! Features art drawn by Kasparition and full voice acting.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
